title: More Mob Variants x Fresh Animations
description: Adds Fresh Animations compatibility to the More Mob Variants mod.
body:
## More Mob Variants x Fresh Animations

This resource pack adds support for the Fresh Animations resource pack when using the More Mob Variants mod. 

To use, just load this pack on top of the default Fresh Animations pack!

## Links to Original Projects:

[Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

[More Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mob-variants)
